data.title: Uber Announces Measures To Ramp Up Electrification Of Its Fleet Ahead Of Tesla's Robotaxi Unveil
data.description: Uber Technologies is working towards its goal of transforming into a zero-emission platform with measures including the introduction of an AI assistant on the driver app to help with EV-related queries, company CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said on Tuesday.

data.title: 2024 Physics Nobel Laureate Geoffrey Hinton Says 'Particularly Proud' Of The Student That Fired OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Who Was 'Less Concerned With Safety Than With Profits'
data.description: After winning the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics, AI pioneer Geoffrey Hinton took a jab at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, expressing pride that one of his former students, Ilya Sutskever, had previously fired Altman over concerns about prioritizing profits over safety in AI development.

data.title: Tesla's Latest FSD Update Smooths Out Jittery Car Visualizations, Fixing 4-Year Bug
data.description: Tesla fixed a four-year-old bug in the rendering of its full self-driving (FSD) driver assistance software on the vehicle display.

data.title: Cathie Wood And Michael Saylor Celebrate Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong's Wedding To Angela Meng: 'Can't Wait To Build A Life'
data.description: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest, extended her congratulations to Brian Armstrong, the Co-founder and CEO of Coinbase, on his recent marriage to Angela Meng.

data.title: Apple TV+ Coming To Amazon Prime Video This Month: What You Need To Know About the $9.99 Add-On
data.description: Amazon and Apple have announced a collaboration to offer Apple TV+ as a $9.99 per month add-on subscription through Prime Video in the U.S., expanding Prime Video's premium content lineup.
